message:
feat(bench): add @logic_table JIT benchmark with metal0 integration

Updates bench_logic_table.zig to use real JIT flow via metal0's
--emit-logic-table-shared flag. The benchmark now attempts to:
1. JIT compile Python @logic_table to shared library
2. Load and call the compiled VectorOps_dot_product function
3. Compare against DuckDB/Polars Python UDF baselines

Note: Current metal0 codegen uses runtime.eval() for list subscripts
which causes type mismatches. Benchmark gracefully handles JIT failure.

Also updates metal0 submodule to include --emit-logic-table-shared support.
